---
title: "Studies"
lang: en
language: ../../assets/language-en.yml
toc-title: "On this page"
---

This page lists currently summarized BMAA-related studies from newest to oldest.

| Year | Authors | Study |
|---|---|---|
| 2026 | Tien, Y.-M., Lin, C.-Y., Lien, Y.-W., & Hsu, L.-C. | [From body to mind: How body-mind axial awareness training enhances body awareness, mindfulness, positive embodiment and mental health in healthcare students](2026-tien-healthcare-students.qmd) |
| 2026 | Lien, Y.-W., Teng, S.-C., & Wei, L.-Y. | [From the body to the mind: Interoception and sense of agency as mechanisms of depression reduction in BMAA](2026-lien-depression-agency.qmd) |
| 2024 | Chiu, C.-H. | [Effects of BMAA combined with lucid-dream therapy on lucid dreaming, nightmares, and sleep quality among people with nightmare distress](2024-chiu-nightmare-lucid-dream.qmd) |
| 2024 | Mou, S.-C. | [Improving interoceptive ability to reduce internet addiction tendency: Effects and mechanisms of BMAA training](2024-mou-internet-addiction.qmd) |
| 2024 | Yang, C.-J. | [Effects of BMAA on interoception, alexithymia, and empathy among adults with high autistic traits](2024-yang-autistic-traits.qmd) |
| 2023 | Yeh, C.-W., Lien, Y.-W., Chen, R.-Y., Chuang, P.-Y., Cheng, W.-H., & Chen, H.-L. | [A preliminary study of a camp-based dynamic contemplative course on children’s sustained attention and balance](2023-yeh-camp-attention-balance.qmd) |
| 2023 | Hung, P.-Y., Chen, Y.-Y., & Yeh, L.-H. | [Brief mindfulness guidance reduces implicit gender stereotypes during reading](2023-hung-gender-stereotype.qmd) |
| 2020 | Weng, W.-T. | [Effects of a short-term dynamic body-mind awareness course on elementary school teachers’ interoceptive awareness, resilience, and perceived stress](2020-weng-teachers-stress-resilience.qmd) |
| 2020 | Hsu, W.-C. | [Effects of a two-week BMAA practice on emotion regulation among university students](2020-hsu-emotion-regulation.qmd) |
| 2019 | Lee, M.-N. | [Feel your body: Effects of a short-term in-class dynamic contemplative course on children’s interoception, executive control, emotion regulation, and motor coordination](2019-lee-feel-your-body.qmd) |
| 2018 | Chang, Y.-J. | [BMAA and integrated activity training for improving children’s executive function and emotion regulation](2018-chang-children-executive-emotion.qmd) |
| 2017 | Lee, S.-Y. | [An initial exploration of body-mind interaction: Effects of BMAA on body sensation, working memory, and attentional control](2017-lee-body-mind-interaction.qmd) |
| 2016 | Teng, S.-C., & Lien, Y.-W. | [What Confucius practiced is good for your mind: Examining the effect of a contemplative practice in Confucian tradition on executive functions](2016-teng-confucius.qmd) |
